title: Custom Strategy Tool
author: Fluffy_Finger_3848
selftext:
This year I decided I’m done hopping between indicators and I’m just going to build one strategy and stick to it.

I spent about 2–3 weeks testing different entry/exit logic

I ended up using a tool called [Strat Studio](https://stratstudio.app) to generate Pine scripts from plain English and iterate faster. It helped me test ideas quickly without rewriting code every time.

Not saying it’s magic, but it made the process way less frustrating.

Curious how others here approach building something they can actually stick to long term.
